name: knowledge-lamborghini
description: But you know what I like a lot more than knowledge? Knowledge. (an eclectic discord bot)

scripts.test: node test.js && tsc --version && tsc --checkJs --noEmit --resolveJsonModule --skipLibCheck --lib es2022,dom bot.js --strict --noImplicitAny false && echo These rules are implemented braindeadly in package.json using git grep. If there are no other results for them then the rule is satistfied: && git grep fs.write

remark upon the check: I don't think there's any particular reason to require es2022 there. Maybe it was the most recent one when I tried to require one in particular to fix some other problem.
